description_long: This is a stylized bird with a rounded, plump body and outstretched wings, featuring a predominantly gray and black color scheme. The head is light gray with a small, pointed black beak and large, round yellow eyes, giving it a cartoonish and expressive appearance. The wings are broad and dark gray, with lighter gray on the inner portions, and the tail is short and slightly squared with a layered feather arrangement. The bird's legs are thin and pink, ending in three forward-facing toes and one backward-facing toe, typical of perching birds. The plumage is smooth with subtle feather detailing, and the crest on the head adds a distinctive touch. This bird would be well-suited for urban environments such as parks, rooftops, or sidewalks.
description: A stylized, plump gray and black bird with outstretched wings, yellow eyes, and a small pointed beak. It features a short, squared tail, pink legs, and a prominent head crest.
description_view_0: Front view shows the bird's symmetrical outstretched wings, large yellow eyes, and small pointed beak.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the rounded body, layered wing feathers, head crest, and pink legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the broad wingspan, short squared tail, and the back of the head crest.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the same feather layering, crest, and leg details.
attribute_plumage_pattern: solid gray body with darker wings and tail, light gray head, and minimal patterning
